title: Jerotes Village Golems
description: Integration between Jerotes Village and Modular Golems
body:
Discord invite: https://discord.gg/BCHNhsDMXz

Dependency: ModularGolems, Jerotes Village, Golem Dungeons

This mod adds materials from Jerotes Village for golems in Modular Golems. Also adds new golem armors, golem weapons, and trial banners.

Trial Banner Deployers: While Golem Dungeons use structures and trial spawner for summoning waves of trial golems, here player can craft banner deployers and choose a place to fight trial golems from the banner. Upon defeating the banner, player can get various unique rewards that can only be obtained this way.
